LanguageData.AM_Elite.degreeDatas.0.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is a successful product of an ancient experimental project, {PAWN_pronoun} almost entirely specialized for combat. {PAWN_pronoun} is extremely hard to defeat.
LanguageData.AM_Elite.degreeDatas.0.label: successful products
LanguageData.AM_MallGuards.degreeDatas.0.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is a fashion guy who is skilled at shooting in a slide shovel, {PAWN_pronoun} can use gun to blast everything he sees.
LanguageData.AM_MallGuards.degreeDatas.0.label: fashion guy
LanguageData.AM_Slaughter.degreeDatas.0.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was implanted with an excessive amount of parasites, which completely destroyed {PAWN_possessive} sanity but greatly increased {PAWN_possessive} strength.
LanguageData.AM_Slaughter.degreeDatas.0.label: parasitic failed product
